description: Style Noteremanika combines edgy style with stylish fits in all of their creations, including this floral, summery top. You can pair the top with a pair of skinny Fit jeans and flip flops for a relaxed and summery look.Product DetailsWhite top with floral prints, has a mandarin collar with a full placket with buttons only half way down, tapering three quarter sleeves, tucks around the neckline for a gathered look and a elasticated hemline  Material and CareCotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron  Size and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
